name: Natural Egg Easter Dyes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash eggs in mild soapy water to remove oily coating which could prevent dye from adhering.
2. Simmer for 20 minutes.
3. SPRING CHICKEN YELLOW: Add turmeric to boiling water, stir until dissolved. Add vinegar.
4. EASTER BUNNY BROWN: Add heaping tablespoon instant coffee to boiling water, stir until dissolved. Add vinegar.
5. SEREN"DIP"ITY: Try boiling eggs with one of the listed ingredients. Add 1/4 teaspoon vinegar to water.
